description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set on a rectangular green plot with a driveway and a garage. The structure features a mix of flat and slightly angled roof sections, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a combination of white and wood-textured exterior walls. The front entrance is accentuated by a wooden door and a small set of steps, while the garage is attached to the left side and has a flat roof. The landscaping includes a paved driveway, a walkway, and several stylized palm trees near the entrance. The rear and side facades are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large windows, a flat and angled roof, attached garage, and minimalist landscaping on a green plot.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long white wall, large windows, and a glimpse of the pool area behind the house.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the garage with a flat roof, driveway, and minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Front view featuring the main entrance with wooden door, steps, large windows, and landscaped driveway with palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain white wall, a single window, and a partial view of the backyard and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and side
